content: p Dan Simmons, the author of more than three dozen books, including the famed  em Hyperion Cantos  em , has died from a stroke.  a href    was 77  a .  p   p Simmons, who worked in elementary education before becoming an author in the 1980s, produced a broad portfolio of writing that spanned several genres, including horror fiction, historical fiction, and science fiction. Often, his books included elements of all of these. This obituary will focus on what is generally considered his greatest work, and what I believe is possibly the greatest science fiction novel of all time,  em Hyperion  em .  p   p Published in 1989,  em Hyperion  em  is set in a far-flung future in which human settlement spans hundreds of planets. The novel feels both familiar, in that its structure follows Chaucer's  em Canterbury Tales  em , and utterly unfamiliar in its strange, far-flung setting.  p  p  a href    full article  a   p   p  a href
